questionText: Você está em um restaurante sofisticado e quer elogiar o chef pela qualidade excepcional do prato que acabou de comer. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: My compliments to the chef — this dish is nothing short of extraordinary.
options: My compliments to the chef — this dish is nothing short of extraordinary.
Tell the cook the food was pretty good tonight.
This meal was okay, I guess the chef did a fine job.
The food here is better than most places I've been to.

questionText: Você é vegetariano e está em um jantar formal. Precisa perguntar discretamente ao garçom se um determinado prato contém carne. Qual é a forma mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Could you kindly confirm whether this dish contains any meat or meat-based stock?
options: Does this have meat in it?
Could you kindly confirm whether this dish contains any meat or meat-based stock?
I don't eat meat, so tell me if there's any in this.
Is this vegetarian or what?

questionText: Você está jantando na casa de amigos britânicos e quer pedir mais comida educadamente. Qual expressão é mais natural e polida?
correctAnswer: Would it be too much trouble to have a second helping?
options: Give me more food, please.
Would it be too much trouble to have a second helping?
I want to eat more of this.
Can I have another plate of this stuff?

questionText: Um colega de trabalho te oferece um bolo que ele mesmo fez. Você quer recusar educadamente sem ofendê-lo. Qual é a melhor resposta?
correctAnswer: That's so thoughtful of you, but I'm afraid I'll have to pass — I'm trying to cut back on sugar.
options: No thanks, I don't like cake.
That's so thoughtful of you, but I'm afraid I'll have to pass — I'm trying to cut back on sugar.
I'm not hungry right now, maybe later.
I don't really eat sweets, sorry.

questionText: Você está em um restaurante e o garçom pergunta como você está achando a comida. Você quer expressar que está adorando o sabor intenso do prato. Qual resposta é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: It's absolutely delicious — the flavors are incredibly rich and well-balanced.
options: It's absolutely delicious — the flavors are incredibly rich and well-balanced.
It tastes good, I like it a lot.
The food is fine, thanks for asking.
Pretty good, actually better than I expected.

questionText: Você quer recomendar um restaurante a um amigo que está visitando sua cidade. Qual expressão transmite melhor um elogio entusiasmado e genuíno?
correctAnswer: You absolutely must try this place — the food is out of this world.
options: There's a restaurant nearby, it's not bad.
You might want to check out this restaurant if you have time.
You absolutely must try this place — the food is out of this world.
I go to this restaurant sometimes, it's pretty decent.

questionText: Você está num brunch com amigos americanos e quer sugerir pedir mais pratos para compartilhar. Qual é a forma mais natural de fazer essa sugestão?
correctAnswer: Why don't we order a few more dishes to share? There are so many things I'd like to try.
options: We should order more food because I'm still hungry.
Why don't we order a few more dishes to share? There are so many things I'd like to try.
Let's get more things from the menu.
Can we order extra plates for everyone?

questionText: Você está num café em Londres e quer pedir uma xícara de chá com leite, da forma mais cortês e natural possível. O que você diria?
correctAnswer: Could I have a cup of tea with milk, please?
options: I want tea with milk.
Bring me tea and milk, please.
Could I have a cup of tea with milk, please?
Give me a tea, I like it with milk.

questionText: Você está escrevendo uma avaliação online de um restaurante e quer mencionar que o atendimento foi impecável e a comida, excepcional. Qual frase é mais adequada para esse contexto?
correctAnswer: The service was impeccable, and every dish we tried was a culinary delight.
options: The service was impeccable, and every dish we tried was a culinary delight.
The waiters were nice and the food was very tasty.
Service was good and food was excellent, would recommend.
We liked the service and the food was really good too.

questionText: Você está num jantar em família e quer expressar que a comida está muito gostosa de forma entusiasmada e informal. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: This is absolutely scrumptious — you've really outdone yourself!
options: This is absolutely scrumptious — you've really outdone yourself!
The food is fine, I enjoy eating it.
This tastes acceptable, good job cooking.
I find this meal to be satisfactory.

questionText: Você está num restaurante italiano e quer perguntar ao garçom qual é o prato mais pedido da casa. Qual é a forma mais natural?
correctAnswer: What would you say is the most popular dish on the menu?
options: Which food do most people order here?
What is your best dish?
What would you say is the most popular dish on the menu?
Tell me what food people like here.

questionText: Você tem uma alergia a nozes e precisa alertar o garçom antes de fazer seu pedido. Qual expressão é a mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I should mention that I have a severe nut allergy — could you please check with the kitchen?
options: I don't like nuts, so don't put them in my food.
I should mention that I have a severe nut allergy — could you please check with the kitchen?
Nuts are bad for me, can you remove them?
Please don't add nuts because I'm allergic.

questionText: Você quer convidar um colega para almoçar juntos de forma espontânea e amigável. Qual é a frase mais natural?
correctAnswer: Fancy grabbing a bite to eat? I know a great place nearby.
options: Do you want to go eat lunch with me somewhere?
Fancy grabbing a bite to eat? I know a great place nearby.
Would you like to have lunch with me at a restaurant?
Let's go get food together somewhere around here.

questionText: Você está descrevendo um prato que comeu e quer dizer que ele tinha um sabor muito marcante e inesquecível. Qual expressão é mais precisa para um falante de nível C2?
correctAnswer: The flavor was so pronounced and lingering — it's the kind of dish that stays with you.
options: The flavor was so pronounced and lingering — it's the kind of dish that stays with you.
The food tasted very strong and I remember it well.
It was a very flavorful dish with a taste I can't forget.
The flavor was intense and I still think about the food.

questionText: Você está num restaurante e a comida demorou mais de uma hora para chegar. Quer reclamar de forma educada mas assertiva. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I don't mean to be a nuisance, but we've been waiting for over an hour — is there an issue with our order?
options: I don't mean to be a nuisance, but we've been waiting for over an hour — is there an issue with our order?
Our food is very late, please bring it now.
We waited too long, can you check on our food?
Why is the food taking so long? We ordered over an hour ago.

questionText: Você está pagando a conta e quer saber se a gorjeta já está incluída no valor. Qual é a forma mais educada de perguntar?
correctAnswer: Is the gratuity already included in the bill?
options: Did you add tip to the price?
Is the tip part of what I have to pay?
Is the gratuity already included in the bill?
How much is the tip in the total amount?

questionText: Você está recusando educadamente uma segunda porção de sobremesa que seu anfitrião está oferecendo com insistência. Qual expressão é mais sofisticada e apropriada?
correctAnswer: I truly couldn't eat another bite — it was absolutely divine, though.
options: No more for me, I'm full already.
I truly couldn't eat another bite — it was absolutely divine, though.
Thanks, but I don't want more dessert now.
I'm too full to eat more, thank you anyway.

questionText: Você está conversando com um sommelier em um restaurante estrelado e quer pedir uma recomendação de vinho que harmonize perfeitamente com seu prato de carne. Qual expressão é mais apropriada?
correctAnswer: I'd appreciate your recommendation on a wine that would pair well with the beef — perhaps something with good tannic structure?
options: Which wine goes with meat? I want something red.
Can you recommend a wine for beef dishes?
I'd appreciate your recommendation on a wine that would pair well with the beef — perhaps something with good tannic structure?
What red wine do you suggest for my steak tonight?

questionText: Você está num festival gastronômico e quer perguntar a um chef sobre a técnica culinária usada em um determinado preparo. Qual é a forma mais culta e precisa de fazer isso?
correctAnswer: I was intrigued by the texture of the fish — was it prepared using sous vide, or did you use a different low-temperature technique?
options: How did you cook the fish? It was very soft.
Did you use a special method to cook the fish?
Was the fish cooked slowly or at high temperature?
I was intrigued by the texture of the fish — was it prepared using sous vide, or did you use a different low-temperature technique?

questionText: Você é crítico gastronômico e precisa descrever um prato que, apesar de tecnicamente bem executado, lhe pareceu sem personalidade. Qual expressão captura melhor essa avaliação nuançada?
correctAnswer: While technically flawless, the dish lacked a certain je ne sais quoi — it felt somewhat soulless.
options: The food was good but not very creative or interesting.
The dish was cooked well but didn't have much flavor.
While technically flawless, the dish lacked a certain je ne sais quoi — it felt somewhat soulless.
It was a nice plate but I expected more originality from the chef.

questionText: Você está negociando com o gerente de um restaurante sobre a organização de um jantar corporativo para 40 pessoas. Precisa perguntar sobre a possibilidade de um menu personalizado. Qual abordagem é mais profissional?
correctAnswer: We were hoping you might be able to accommodate a bespoke menu tailored to our dietary requirements and preferences.
options: Can you make a special menu just for our group?
We need a custom menu for our company dinner.
We were hoping you might be able to accommodate a bespoke menu tailored to our dietary requirements and preferences.
Is it possible to change the menu for our event?

questionText: Você está descrevendo para amigos sua experiência em um restaurante de alta gastronomia onde cada prato era apresentado como uma obra de arte. Qual expressão comunica melhor essa ideia?
correctAnswer: Each course was a masterpiece in its own right — the presentation was as meticulously crafted as the flavors themselves.
options: Every dish looked really beautiful and tasted good too.
The food presentation was very artistic and the taste was amazing.
Each course was a masterpiece in its own right — the presentation was as meticulously crafted as the flavors themselves.
All the plates looked like art and the food was delicious.

questionText: Você está explicando a um amigo estrangeiro o que é o conceito de 'comfort food' e como isso se relaciona com a identidade cultural de um povo. Qual frase explica melhor esse conceito?
correctAnswer: Comfort food goes beyond mere sustenance — it's deeply intertwined with nostalgia, identity, and the emotional landscape of a culture.
options: Comfort food is food that makes people feel happy when they eat it.
It's the kind of food people eat when they want to feel better emotionally.
Comfort food goes beyond mere sustenance — it's deeply intertwined with nostalgia, identity, and the emotional landscape of a culture.
People eat comfort food because it reminds them of home and family.

questionText: Você está participando de uma degustação de queijos finos e quer comentar que um determinado queijo tem um sabor muito complexo e amadurecido. Qual expressão é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: This cheese has a remarkably complex flavor profile — the aging process has imparted an earthy depth with a subtle sharpness.
options: This cheese tastes strong and mature, very aged.
This cheese has a remarkably complex flavor profile — the aging process has imparted an earthy depth with a subtle sharpness.
The flavor of this cheese is very deep and complicated.
This is a very tasty aged cheese with a strong flavor.

questionText: Você está escrevendo uma crítica gastronômica e quer expressar que a chef soube equilibrar perfeitamente tradição e inovação em seu menu. Qual frase é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: Chef Martinez strikes a masterful balance between honoring culinary heritage and pushing the boundaries of contemporary gastronomy.
options: The chef mixed traditional and modern cooking styles very well.
Chef Martinez strikes a masterful balance between honoring culinary heritage and pushing the boundaries of contemporary gastronomy.
The menu had both classic and innovative dishes done in a good way.
The chef combined old and new cooking techniques in her menu successfully.

questionText: Você está num restaurante e percebe que o prato que trouxeram não corresponde ao que foi descrito no cardápio. Quer corrigir a situação de forma firme mas educada. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I believe there may have been a mix-up — the menu described a truffle reduction, but this dish doesn't appear to have one.
options: This is not what I ordered, it's different from the menu.
I believe there may have been a mix-up — the menu described a truffle reduction, but this dish doesn't appear to have one.
The dish you brought me is wrong, it doesn't match the description.
Excuse me, my food is not what the menu said it would be.

questionText: Você está participando de um podcast sobre culinária e quer explicar por que a fermentação está na moda na gastronomia contemporânea. Qual resposta é mais elaborada e precisa?
correctAnswer: Fermentation has undergone a remarkable renaissance — it bridges ancestral food preservation techniques with modern interest in gut health and umami-forward flavor development.
options: Fermentation is popular now because it's healthy and makes food taste better.
People are interested in fermented foods because they're good for digestion.
Fermentation has undergone a remarkable renaissance — it bridges ancestral food preservation techniques with modern interest in gut health and umami-forward flavor development.
Fermented foods have become trendy because chefs discovered how much flavor they add.

questionText: Você está sendo entrevistado sobre seus hábitos alimentares e quer explicar que prefere cozinhar em casa porque se importa com a origem dos ingredientes. Qual frase é mais sofisticada?
correctAnswer: I've become increasingly discerning about provenance — knowing that my ingredients are ethically sourced and locally grown matters greatly to me.
options: I prefer homemade food because I want to know where ingredients come from.
I've become increasingly discerning about provenance — knowing that my ingredients are ethically sourced and locally grown matters greatly to me.
Cooking at home lets me control the quality and origin of my food.
I like cooking myself so I can use fresh and local ingredients.

questionText: Você está num evento de culinária e quer fazer uma crítica construtiva a uma receita de molho que achou muito ácida. Como expressaria isso de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: The sauce, while vibrant, could benefit from a touch more fat to temper the acidity and round out the overall flavor profile.
options: The sauce is too sour and needs more fat to balance the taste.
This sauce is very acidic, it would be better with less vinegar.
The sauce, while vibrant, could benefit from a touch more fat to temper the acidity and round out the overall flavor profile.
I think the sauce is a bit too sharp and could use some balancing.

questionText: Você está numa conferência sobre sustentabilidade alimentar e quer argumentar que o desperdício de alimentos é um problema ético além de ambiental. Qual frase articula melhor esse argumento?
correctAnswer: Food waste is not merely an environmental failing — it is a moral indictment of a system that squanders nourishment while millions go hungry.
options: Wasting food is bad for the environment and also unfair to hungry people.
Food waste is not merely an environmental failing — it is a moral indictment of a system that squanders nourishment while millions go hungry.
We shouldn't waste food because it harms the planet and is ethically wrong.
The problem of food waste has both environmental and moral dimensions we must address.

questionText: Você está numa aula de culinária avançada e o instrutor quer saber se você entendeu a técnica de emulsificação. Qual resposta demonstra domínio do conceito?
correctAnswer: Emulsification involves suspending two immiscible liquids — typically fat and water — using an emulsifier that lowers interfacial tension and stabilizes the mixture.
options: Emulsification is when you mix oil and water together to create a sauce.
It's the process of combining fat and liquid by whisking them hard enough.
Emulsification involves suspending two immiscible liquids — typically fat and water — using an emulsifier that lowers interfacial tension and stabilizes the mixture.
You emulsify things by blending oils with water-based liquids until they combine.

questionText: Você está escrevendo sobre a gastronomia molecular e quer explicar como ela desafia as percepções sensoriais do comensal. Qual frase é mais precisa e elegante?
correctAnswer: Molecular gastronomy subverts conventional sensory expectations by manipulating the physical and chemical properties of ingredients to create unexpected textures and flavors.
options: Molecular gastronomy uses science to make food look and taste different from what people expect.
It's a cooking style that changes how food looks and tastes using chemistry.
Molecular gastronomy subverts conventional sensory expectations by manipulating the physical and chemical properties of ingredients to create unexpected textures and flavors.
This type of cooking surprises people by changing the texture and appearance of normal foods.

questionText: Você quer elogiar um vinho natural que acabou de experimentar, destacando sua complexidade e caráter único, em uma conversa com um enólogo. Qual é a expressão mais adequada?
correctAnswer: There's a fascinating terroir-driven complexity to this wine — the natural fermentation has preserved a rawness that speaks eloquently of its origin.
options: This natural wine is very complex and tastes strongly of where it comes from.
I love this wine, it has a unique taste that comes from its natural production.
There's a fascinating terroir-driven complexity to this wine — the natural fermentation has preserved a rawness that speaks eloquently of its origin.
The natural fermentation gave this wine a very interesting and unusual character.

questionText: Você está num debate acadêmico sobre gastronomia e identidade nacional, e quer argumentar que a culinária de um país é um espelho da sua história. Qual argumento é mais sofisticado?
correctAnswer: A nation's cuisine is an edible archive of its history — each dish encodes centuries of migration, trade, conquest, and cultural exchange.
options: Food reflects a country's history because recipes have been passed down for generations.
The cuisine of a country shows what has happened historically to its people.
A nation's cuisine is an edible archive of its history — each dish encodes centuries of migration, trade, conquest, and cultural exchange.
Traditional food tells us a lot about the culture and past of any nation.

questionText: Você está escrevendo uma resenha de um livro de culinária e quer criticar que as receitas são tecnicamente impecáveis, mas inacessíveis para o cozinheiro doméstico médio. Qual frase articula essa crítica com mais precisão?
correctAnswer: While the recipes are technically rigorous and beautifully photographed, they presuppose a level of culinary expertise and equipment that places them firmly beyond the reach of the home cook.
options: The recipes are very technical and difficult for regular people to make at home.
Although the book looks great, the recipes are too complicated for most home cooks.
While the recipes are technically rigorous and beautifully photographed, they presuppose a level of culinary expertise and equipment that places them firmly beyond the reach of the home cook.
The cookbook has professional-level recipes that average home cooks will struggle with.

questionText: Você está numa mesa-redonda sobre o futuro da alimentação e quer argumentar que as proteínas alternativas não são apenas uma tendência passageira, mas uma necessidade geopolítica. Qual argumento é mais persuasivo e sofisticado?
correctAnswer: Alternative proteins represent far more than a dietary fad — they are an existential response to the converging pressures of population growth, climate disruption, and the unsustainable resource demands of industrial animal farming.
options: Alternative proteins are important for the future because the world population is growing.
We need alternative proteins because traditional farming harms the environment too much.

Alternative proteins represent far more than a dietary fad — they are an existential response to the converging pressures of population growth, climate disruption, and the unsustainable resource demands of industrial animal farming.
The rise of alternative proteins is driven by climate change and the need to feed more people.

questionText: Você está dissertando sobre a paradoxo do prazer gastronômico no contexto de crises humanitárias e quer expressar a tensão ética de apreciar alta culinária num mundo com fome. Qual frase captura melhor essa tensão?
correctAnswer: There is an inescapable moral dissonance in indulging in the theatre of haute cuisine when the specter of hunger haunts so much of humanity.
options: It feels wrong to enjoy expensive food when so many people in the world are starving.
There is an inescapable moral dissonance in indulging in the theatre of haute cuisine when the specter of hunger haunts so much of humanity.
Enjoying high-end food is ethically problematic given the global food insecurity situation.
The contrast between luxury dining and world hunger creates an uncomfortable ethical question.

questionText: Você está fazendo uma palestra sobre o conceito de 'umami' e precisa explicar sua descoberta e relevância científica para uma audiência especializada. Qual explicação é a mais precisa e completa?
correctAnswer: Umami, first identified by Kikunae Ikeda in 1908, corresponds to the taste of glutamate and nucleotides, and has since been recognized as the fifth basic taste, fundamentally reshaping our understanding of gustatory perception.
options: Umami is the fifth basic taste, discovered in Japan, associated with savory and rich flavors.
Umami was identified by a Japanese scientist as a taste linked to MSG and other savory compounds.

Umami, first identified by Kikunae Ikeda in 1908, corresponds to the taste of glutamate and nucleotides, and has since been recognized as the fifth basic taste, fundamentally reshaping our understanding of gustatory perception.
The umami taste was discovered in the early 20th century in Japan and relates to savory glutamate flavors in food.

questionText: Você é um chef com estrelas Michelin sendo entrevistado sobre sua filosofia culinária. Quer articular que para você cozinhar é um ato de memória e afeto. Qual resposta é mais evocativa e sofisticada?
correctAnswer: For me, cooking is an act of recollection — every dish I create is a dialogue between my palate's memory and the emotional residue of formative experiences around the table.
options: I cook because food reminds me of my childhood and the emotions I felt back then.
My cooking is inspired by memories and the feelings I associate with eating.
For me, cooking is an act of recollection — every dish I create is a dialogue between my palate's memory and the emotional residue of formative experiences around the table.
Each dish I make reflects my personal history and the meals that shaped who I am as a cook.

questionText: Você está participando de um simpósio sobre gastronomia e neurociência e quer explicar como o contexto influencia a percepção do sabor. Qual afirmação é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: Flavor perception is profoundly context-dependent — variables such as ambient lighting, music, vessel shape, and even the server's affect can measurably modulate the hedonic experience of eating.
options: The environment where we eat affects how we perceive the taste of food.
Scientific studies show that atmosphere influences our enjoyment and perception of flavor.
Flavor perception is profoundly context-dependent — variables such as ambient lighting, music, vessel shape, and even the server's affect can measurably modulate the hedonic experience of eating.
Our brains interpret flavor differently depending on the context in which we're eating the food.

questionText: Você está debatendo a gentrificação gastronômica e quer argumentar que a popularização de culinárias étnicas frequentemente apaga a narrativa cultural dos povos que as originaram. Qual argumento é mais contundente?
correctAnswer: The commodification of ethnic cuisines for mainstream consumption often strips them of their cultural context, transforming living culinary traditions into exotic spectacles divorced from their originating communities.
options: When ethnic food becomes popular in mainstream culture, the original community loses control of its identity.
Popularizing ethnic food often takes it out of context and erases its cultural meaning.

The commodification of ethnic cuisines for mainstream consumption often strips them of their cultural context, transforming living culinary traditions into exotic spectacles divorced from their originating communities.
Mainstream appropriation of ethnic cuisines tends to devalue the cultural heritage behind them.

questionText: Você está escrevendo um ensaio sobre a estética do minimalismo na alta gastronomia contemporânea e quer argumentar que 'menos é mais' pode ser um manifesto filosófico tanto quanto estético. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: In the finest contemporary kitchens, restraint is not an absence of ambition but rather its most disciplined expression — each ingredient on the plate is indispensable, nothing extraneous permitted.
options: The best restaurants today use few ingredients but make each one count for maximum impact.
Minimalist cooking in haute cuisine means using only what is necessary and removing the rest.
In the finest contemporary kitchens, restraint is not an absence of ambition but rather its most disciplined expression — each ingredient on the plate is indispensable, nothing extraneous permitted.
Top chefs today believe that simplicity in plating and ingredients reflects true culinary mastery.

questionText: Você está avaliando a obra de um chef que incorpora ingredientes indígenas amazônicos em sua cozinha de vanguarda. Quer destacar a dimensão política e decolonial desse trabalho. Qual frase é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: By centering Amazonian indigenous ingredients in a haute cuisine context, the chef enacts a decolonial gesture — reclaiming culinary sovereignty and repositioning peripheral food cultures at the pinnacle of gastronomic discourse.
options: Using Amazonian ingredients in fine dining is a political statement about indigenous food culture.
This chef's work is important because it brings attention to native Brazilian ingredients and cultures.

By centering Amazonian indigenous ingredients in a haute cuisine context, the chef enacts a decolonial gesture — reclaiming culinary sovereignty and repositioning peripheral food cultures at the pinnacle of gastronomic discourse.
Incorporating indigenous Amazonian products into fine dining challenges Western culinary hierarchies.

questionText: Você está moderando um painel sobre food tech e quer introduzir o debate sobre se a carne cultivada em laboratório pode resolver a crise climática sem perder a dimensão cultural da carne. Qual introdução é mais eloquente?
correctAnswer: Cultivated meat presents a profound dilemma: it may well address the environmental catastrophe wrought by conventional animal agriculture, yet risks severing the deep cultural and ritualistic bonds that humanity has forged with the act of rearing and slaughtering animals for food.
options: Lab-grown meat could be good for the environment, but people might not accept it culturally.

Cultivated meat presents a profound dilemma: it may well address the environmental catastrophe wrought by conventional animal agriculture, yet risks severing the deep cultural and ritualistic bonds that humanity has forged with the act of rearing and slaughtering animals for food.
The rise of lab-grown meat raises questions about whether we can separate food from its cultural origins.
Synthetic meat could solve climate issues from farming, but the cultural value of traditional meat cannot be ignored.

questionText: Você está escrevendo um artigo acadêmico sobre a obra de Brillat-Savarin e quer citar sua famosa máxima sobre o que comemos e nossa identidade. Qual reformulação captura melhor o espírito do aforismo original?
correctAnswer: Brillat-Savarin's dictum — 'tell me what you eat, and I shall tell you what you are' — posits the act of eating as fundamentally constitutive of personal and social identity.
options: Brillat-Savarin said that food defines who we are as people and members of society.
According to Brillat-Savarin, our food choices reveal a great deal about our character and culture.
Brillat-Savarin's dictum — 'tell me what you eat, and I shall tell you what you are' — posits the act of eating as fundamentally constitutive of personal and social identity.
Brillat-Savarin believed that the food we eat reflects our identity and the society we belong to.

questionText: Você está num jantar de negócios internacional e seu anfitrião japonês serve um prato que você não reconhece. Quer demonstrar curiosidade cultural genuína e sofisticada ao perguntar sobre o prato. Qual é a melhor abordagem?
correctAnswer: This is a dish I'm not familiar with — I'd be genuinely curious to hear about its origins and the role it plays in Japanese culinary tradition.
options: I don't know this food. What is it and where does it come from?
This is a dish I'm not familiar with — I'd be genuinely curious to hear about its origins and the role it plays in Japanese culinary tradition.
Can you explain what this food is? I've never seen it before.
What kind of dish is this? I'd like to know more about Japanese cuisine.

questionText: Você está num debate sobre alimentação saudável e quer contestar a ideia de que alimentos 'naturais' são necessariamente mais saudáveis. Qual argumento derruba melhor essa falácia?
correctAnswer: The naturalistic fallacy pervades nutritional discourse — the mere fact that a substance is 'natural' tells us nothing of its safety or efficacy, as arsenic, botulinum toxin, and mercury amply demonstrate.
options: Natural foods are not always healthier because many natural substances are actually poisonous.
The idea that natural equals healthy is a myth, since many toxic substances occur in nature.

The naturalistic fallacy pervades nutritional discourse — the mere fact that a substance is 'natural' tells us nothing of its safety or efficacy, as arsenic, botulinum toxin, and mercury amply demonstrate.
Natural does not mean safe or nutritious, since nature contains many harmful compounds.

questionText: Você está participando de um colóquio gastronômico e quer argumentar que a crise de identidade da culinária brasileira contemporânea deriva de uma tensão entre globalização e afirmação cultural. Qual argumento é mais elaborado?
correctAnswer: Brazilian contemporary cuisine finds itself at a crossroads — navigating the tension between the homogenizing pull of global food trends and an urgent need to articulate a distinctly Brazilian culinary voice rooted in its extraordinary biodiversity and plural cultural heritage.
options: Brazilian food today is struggling to maintain its identity in the face of international influences.
Contemporary Brazilian chefs must balance global trends with the country's own rich food traditions.

Brazilian contemporary cuisine finds itself at a crossroads — navigating the tension between the homogenizing pull of global food trends and an urgent need to articulate a distinctly Brazilian culinary voice rooted in its extraordinary biodiversity and plural cultural heritage.
The globalization of food culture challenges Brazil to define what makes its cuisine unique and valuable.

questionText: Você está lendo um cardápio em francês num restaurante de alta gastronomia e encontra o termo 'mise en place'. Um amigo leigo pergunta o que significa. Qual explicação é a mais precisa e completa?
correctAnswer: Mise en place — literally 'everything in its place' — refers to the professional kitchen practice of preparing and organizing all ingredients and tools before cooking begins, underpinning the efficiency of any high-volume culinary operation.
options: Mise en place means getting all ingredients ready before you start cooking.
It's a French term that describes the organization and preparation of ingredients in professional cooking.

Mise en place — literally 'everything in its place' — refers to the professional kitchen practice of preparing and organizing all ingredients and tools before cooking begins, underpinning the efficiency of any high-volume culinary operation.
The term describes the process of setting up a kitchen station before service begins in a restaurant.

questionText: Você está num coquetel de gastronomia e ouve alguém dizer que 'a comida de rua é a verdadeira alma da culinária de uma cidade'. Quer concordar e expandir o argumento de forma sofisticada. Qual resposta é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I couldn't agree more — street food is where culinary tradition remains most unmediated, untouched by the affectations of fine dining, and most honestly expressive of the lived experience of its people.
options: I agree completely. Street food represents the most authentic cooking of any culture.
That's very true. Street food is less formal and shows the real food culture of a city.

I couldn't agree more — street food is where culinary tradition remains most unmediated, untouched by the affectations of fine dining, and most honestly expressive of the lived experience of its people.
Exactly! Street food is more genuine than restaurant food because it comes from ordinary people.

questionText: Você é um nutricionista sendo entrevistado sobre ortorexia e quer distingui-la de uma dieta saudável de forma precisa e clínica. Qual resposta é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Orthorexia differs from healthy eating in that the obsessive preoccupation with food purity becomes intrinsically pathological — it is not about health outcomes per se, but about the psychological rigidity and social impairment it induces.
options: Orthorexia is different from healthy eating because it becomes an unhealthy obsession with food quality.
Unlike normal healthy eating, orthorexia involves an extreme and harmful fixation on eating pure foods.

Orthorexia differs from healthy eating in that the obsessive preoccupation with food purity becomes intrinsically pathological — it is not about health outcomes per se, but about the psychological rigidity and social impairment it induces.
The difference between orthorexia and a healthy diet is the level of anxiety and social isolation it causes.

questionText: Você está finalizando uma palestra sobre o futuro da gastronomia sustentável e quer concluir com uma reflexão poderosa sobre a responsabilidade coletiva dos profissionais do setor. Qual fecho é mais impactante?
correctAnswer: We stand at a pivotal juncture: the choices we make in our kitchens today — about sourcing, waste, and what we choose to celebrate on our menus — will reverberate through ecosystems and communities for generations to come.
options: As food professionals, we have a responsibility to make choices that are good for the planet's future.
The gastronomy industry must adopt sustainable practices to protect the environment for future generations.

We stand at a pivotal juncture: the choices we make in our kitchens today — about sourcing, waste, and what we choose to celebrate on our menus — will reverberate through ecosystems and communities for generations to come.
Every decision made in the food industry today has long-term consequences for our environment and society.
